title: LEMCHAN – MIZORAM FILM FESTIVAL 2026 HELD FOR THE FIRST TIME IN MIZORAM | FESTIVAL INAUGURATED BY IPRP&S MINISTER
content:
544/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 16th March, 2026:The three-day Lemchan – Mizoram Film Festival 2026, organized for the first time through the joint efforts of the Ministry of Information & Broadcasting, the National Film Development Corporation, and the Directorate of Information & Public Relations, Government of Mizoram, commenced today at the I&PR Office, Treasury Square. The inaugural programme was held at the Mini Theatre, Lianchhiari Run, where the festival was formally inaugurated by Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Minister for Information, Public Relations, Printing & Stationery (IPRP&S) Department.

In his address, Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova expressed his delight at the organization of the first-ever Mizoram Film Festival. He stated that Mizoram is blessed with many talented and creative individuals, and that this festival provides an important platform for local filmmakers to showcase their talents and present Mizo stories to the world. He also expressed the desire for greater collaboration with other regions in the field of filmmaking and noted that the festival would serve as an important step forward for Mizoram’s progress in the film industry. The Minister further highlighted that film is a powerful medium for storytelling that not only entertains and educates people but also creates livelihood opportunities for the youth. He conveyed his best wishes for the festival and hoped that filmmakers, artists, and all attendees would have an enjoyable and fruitful experience.

Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo, Secretary, IPRP&S, welcomed the gathering and commended the Directorate of Information & Public Relations for taking the initiative to organize the festival. She also expressed her gratitude to the film experts invited from different parts of India for taking the time to attend and participate in the event.

Pi Lilette Dubey, a renowned Bollywood personality who has acted in numerous films, also addressed the gathering. She expressed her happiness at being invited to attend the Mizoram Film Festival and spoke about how cinema and music retain their value across generations and serve as powerful forces that connect people of different cultures and languages.

Pi Gouri Nair, Head of Domestic Film Festival, NFDC, also delivered a speech in which she expressed hope that the festival would become an important catalyst for the growth of the film industry in Mizoram and the North-East region.

Lemchan – Mizoram Film Festival will be held at the I&PR Office, Treasury Square, from 16–18 March 2026. During the three-day festival, various learning sessions with film experts will be conducted, and selected films from different states as well as Mizo films will be screened. Film professionals from various parts of India have also been invited to participate in the festival.

title: A VAWIKHATNA ATAN MIZORAM-AH ‘LEMCHAN – MIZORAM FILM FESTIVAL 2026’ NEIH A NI | IPRP&S MINISTER-IN FESTIVAL A HAWNG
content:
4849/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 16th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Ministry of Information & Broadcasting, National Film Development Corporation leh Directorate of Information & Public Relations, Govt of Mizoram tangkawp ten Mizorama a vawi khatna atana an buatsaih, ni thum awh tur ‘Lemchan – Mizoram Film Festival 2026’ chu I&PR Office, Treasury Square-ah tan a ni a. A hawnna inkhawm hi Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Minister, Information, Public Relations, Printing & Stationery (IPRP&S) Department chuan Mini-theatre, Lianchhiari Run-ah hmanpuiin, festival hi a hawng nghal a ni.

Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan a vawi khatna atana Lemchan - Mizoram Film Festival buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Mizoram-in mi thiam leh creative tak tak kan ngah thu sawiin,  Film Festival chu Mizo filmmaker-te tan an thiamna pho lanna leh khawvel hmaaMizo thawnthutepho chhuahna hmun pawimawh tak a nih thu a tarlang a. Film siam lamah ram dangte nen thawh hona tha neih a duh thu a sawi bawk. Minister chuan film hi chanchin thehdarhna hmanraw tha tak, mipuite hlimna petu leh zirtirna tha tak tak pek chhuahna a nih bakah, mizo thalaite thiam theih zawng tak thil a nih thute sawiin, "thalaite tan eizawnna siamtu, employment generation pawimawh tak a nihnate hi ngaihthah chi a ni lo" a ti a; film lama mizo thalaite talent hai chhuah a nih zel theih nan leh ram tan hlawk zawka an thawh zel theihna turin sawrkar pawhin hma a lak  zel tur thu a sawi bawk a. Filmmaker-te, artist-te leh he festival chhimtu zawng zawngte hnenah festival hlimawm tak leh hlawkthlak tak nei turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo, Secretary, IPRP&S chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin, he festival buatsaih tura I&PR Directorate hmalakna chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. India hmun hrang hrang atanga film lama mi thiam sawm bikte hnenah an hun hlu tak senga he Festival an rawn chhim theih avangin lawmthu a sawi.

Festival chhim tura sawm, Bollywood film engemaw zata chang tawh, Pi Lilette Dubey pawhin festival hawnna inkhawmah hian thu sawiin, Mizoram Film Festival chhim tura sawm a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Lemchan leh rimawi hi kum tam tak ral hnu pawha an hlutna hloh lo an nih thu leh hnam hrang hrang leh tawng hrang hrang hmangtute thlun zawmtu pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi.

Pi Gouri Nair, Head, Domestic Film Festival, NFDC pawhin thusawiin, he festival hi Mizoram leh North-east region-a film lama hmasawnna thlentu pawimawh tak ni se a tih thu a sawi.

Lemchan – Mizoram Film Festival hi I&PR office, Treasury Square-ah February 16-18, 2026 chhung neih tur a ni a. Ni thum chhung hian film lama mi thiamte hnen atangin zirtirna hrang hrang neih a ni dawn a, state hrang hrang film thlan bikte leh Mizo film-te chhuah (screening) a ni dawn bawk. He festival-ah hian India ram state hrang hrang atangin film siam lama mi thiam eng emaw zat sawm an ni.

title: MIZORAM STATE PROJECT MONITORING COMMITEE (MSPMM) TEN SOLID WASTE MANAGEMENT CENTRE, LAWNGTLAI ENFIAH
content:
4848/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 16th March 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram State Project Monitoring Commitee ( MSPMC) - chuan Solid Wasteangement Centre, Lawngtlai chu a hmunah kalin hnathawh mekte an enfiah.

Mizoram State Project Monitoring Commitee (MSPMC) - team hian hna tha leh ringtlak ni turin dan ang thlapa thawh a pawimawh hle an ti a. MSPMC, Inspection Team - te hian Wet Waste Composting Centre, Dry Waste Composting Centre, Site Office cum Staff quarters, Sanitary Landfill leh a dangte a hnathawh mek chu endikin, thawktute nen sawihona an nei a. Hmanrua hmante a that tawk leh tawk lohte khawl hmangin an endik bawk a ni.MSPMC Inspection Team - te hian Mizoram sawrkar hnenah report an thehlut leh dawn a ni.

Mizoram State Project Monitoring Commitee- hi Er. Sanghrima Chongthu chuan hoin, MSPMC atangin Member- Er. R. Romawia, Pu B. Lalkhawngaihzuala, leh Er. Remlalmuanpuia, PA to Chairman, MSPMC - ten an tel thei a ni.

Solid Waste Management Centre,Lawngtlai hi Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation (UDPA) hnuaia sak niin, cheng 6,97,70,000 senga sak tur a ni a. Hnathawh hi kum 2024, October- khan tan a ni a, kum hnih chhunga zawh fel tura ruahman a ni. Solid Waste Management System, ah hian  - Wet Waste Composting Centre, Dry Waste Composting Centre, Site Office cum Staff quarters, Sanitary Landfill leh a dangte a awm dawn a. Solid Waste Management System, Lawngtlai hi KMMTP kawngpui Phaikhangmual a  awm  niin, a sak hna thawktu hi Lalfamkima, Aizawl a ni.

title: MONTHLY CRIME REPORT UNDER MLP ACT, 2019 FOR THE MONTH OF FEBRUARY, 2026
Kar Khat awh tur-Hnangtah training
content:
4846/2025-2026

AIZAWL, March 16, 2026: Kar khat awh tur Thiam hnang tah in zirtirna hun chu Edenthar MHIP hall ah vawiin 16.03.2026  khan tan a ni. He training hi ICFRE-Bamboo and Rattan Centre, Bethlehem Vengthlang te buatsaih niin, Pu H. Lalremtluanga, Corporator, AMC Ward No, VI chu khuallian niin, hawnna hun a hman pui a. Pu C. Hratliana, Chairman, Local Council Edenthar, Aizawl chu khual zahawm a ni. He training ah hian Edenthar vengchhung a tang a thlan chhuah bik mi 20 te training ah hian an tel a ni.  Pi Vanlalchhanhimi, Master Trainer in heng thlan chhuah bik mi 20 te hi training a pe a ni.

Pu Sandeep Yadav, Scientist-D & Head, ICFRE-BRC chuan kalkhawm te lawm na thu sawiin, ICFRE-BRC hmalak na hrang hrang te a tarlang a. Dr, Nitin Kulkarni, Director, ICFRE-RFRI, Jorhat pawh in online hmang a he hun hi rawn tel pui bawk in, Thiam hnang tah hmang a eizawng tu te chawi kan zel chu a pawimawh thu sawiin, Trainees te chu a hmasawn zel thei tur khawp a thiamna paw chhuak ngei turin a chah bawk.

Khuallian chuan thu sawiin, Mau hmang a eizawng tu, a bikin thiam hnang tah hmang a eizawngte chawi kan zel na tur ah AMC leh BRC Office te chu thawh ho zel a pawimawh thu a sawi a, eizawnna kawng a veng mipui te hmasawn zel theihna tur ain hei aia chak leh zual a hma la a, Self Help Group kal tlang a hma sawn zel tum turin kal khawm te a chah bawk. Pu C. Hratliana, khual zahawm pawhin thu sawiin, ICFRE-BRC ten hetiang hun an veng chhung ah an rawn buatsaih chu lawmawm a tih thu  a sawi a. An hmalakna leh an hnathawh te chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

He hun hi Pu Subhaprada Behera, Scientist-B chuan lawmthu sawiin a khar a. Training hian Tunkar chhung Zirtawpni thleng a  awh ang.

Attachment

title: Khawzawlah District Level Workshop on Handholding Scheme neih a ni
content:
4845/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 16th March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 khan DC Conference Hall, Khawzawl-ah District Level Worshop on Handholding Scheme chu Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana kaihhruainain neih a ni a, he scheme hnuaia loan lak dan chungchang inhrilhhriatna neih a ni.

Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan District Level Worshop on Handholding Scheme programme buatsaih theih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Bana Kaih scheme hi sawrkarin ram mipuite, hmasawnna lam pan tuma rilru, ngaihtuahna, tha leh zung senga theihtawp chhuahte tan an bana kaia an harsatnate hriatpuia hmasawn tura a puihna a ni tih hriat a tul thu a sawi a. Sawrkara innghat tawp lova mimalin theihtawp chhuaha beih ve hmasak phawt a tul a ni a ti a, Hmasawnna rahbi kan kai hian keimahni bakah kan chhungkua, khawtlang leh ram tan a ni tih hriat a tul hle thu kalkhawmte a chah a, he scheme tihlawhtling tura theihtawp chhuah theuh turin a sawm a ni.

He hunah hian Pu R. Lalrinhlua, SDC hnen atangin district report ngaihthlak a ni a, LDM aiawhin SBI Manager hnen atangin partner bank ten loan an pek chhuah tawh dante ngaihthlak a ni bawk. Heng bakah hian CEO Handholding Scheme, Pu Lalfakzuala leh Pi H. Lalhmachhuani, DDM, NABARD hnen atangin Bana Kaih hnuaia loan lak theih dan hrang hrang leh KCC kalphung inhrilh hriatna hun hman a ni a, chairman kaihhruainain interaction hlawkthlak tak hman niin, Bana Kaih hnuaia loan la hlawhtlingte video clip thlir hona neih a ni bawk.

Workshop Programme hman zawh hian CEO Handholding kaihhruainain Bana Kaih hnuaia Progress Partner thenkhatte hmalakna a hmunah tlawh nghal a ni.

Khawzawl District-ah hian Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme hnuaiah loan dilna hi 44 dawn niin 31 approved a ni tawh a, 13 return awmin Pending hi 13 a awm a, a vaia loan pek chhuah tawh hi cheng nuai 131.51 (₹131.51 lakh) a ni.

Attachment

title: TRAINING CHHUAK TE THLAHNA HUN HMANG
content:
4844/2025-2026

16th March, 2026 :March 16, 2026 (Thawhtanni) chawhnu dar 1 khan MYC Coaching Centre, MINECO ah MYC, Honda India Foundation leh Visan Foundation te tangkawpin an buatsaih Project Buniyaad Hotel Management (Food & Beverages) kum 2025-2026 atana batch hnuhnung ber training chhuak te thlahna hun (valedictory ceremony) hman a ni a. Thla 2 training chhuak Mizo thalai mi 17 (sawmpasarih) te hnenah Certificate hlan an ni.

He hun hi Pu V. Malrosanga, Superintendent, MYC in a hmanpui a, Visan Foundation atangin Trainer Pi Lalrinawmi Hnialum leh Pu Vanlalvena Fanai te an tel bawk a ni.

Thalai training chhuak te hi heng hmunah te hian hna an thawk nghal dawn a ni.

1. Taj Damdama, Gurugram2. Taj Coromandel, Chennai3. Tenpins Hospitaity, Kolkata4. Holiday Inn Express & Suits, Bengaluru

Tun dinhmunah Project Buniyaad hnuaiah hian Mizo thalai 324 in training hi an zo fel tawh a ni.

title: Champhaiah CM Special Package Phase II sem chhuah a ni
content:
4843/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 16th March 2026:Vawiin khan Thangtea Hall, Champhai Kahrawtah Chief Minister's Special Package Phase II chu Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan a sem chhuak a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan he hamthatna hlu tak dawngtute a lawmpui thu a sawi a, an thil dawn atang hian eizawnna mumal leh awmze nei tak siam chhuak turin a chah a, department hotute pawhin theihtawp chhuaha an mamawhnaa tanpui zel turin a fuih bawk a ni.

He hun hi hun hnihah then niin hun khatna hi Champhai District A.H & Vety. Officer Dr. Lalbiakzuala Sailo chuan a kaihruai a, District Commerce & Industries Officer Pu Vanlalpara'n Handholding Scheme chungchang tlangpui a sawi a, SBI Lead District Manager Pu Lawmkima chuan Technical Training & Financial Literacy chungchang sawiin SDO (Sadar) Dr. Peter Malsawmtluanga'n fuihna thu a sawi a ni.

Hun hnihna hi SDO (Sadar) Dr. Peter Malsawmtluanga'n kaihruaiin Bana Kaih District Monitoring Commitee Member Secretary a nihna angin technical report a pe nghal a, progress partner te nen inkawmna hun hman a ni bawk a, SDC Pu Lalchhuanawma Ralte chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

CM Special Pakage thawhhnihna hi mi 178 te hnena pek niin Agriculture Department atangin mi 7, Commerce & Industries atangin mi 34, A.H & Vety. Department atangain mi 101, Horticulture Department atangin mi 29, Fisheries Department atangin mi 6 leh Sericulture Department atangin mi 1 Progress Partner te hnena sum pek chhuah zawng zawng hi cheng 89,00,000 (₹89 lakhs) a ni.

title: Mamit District Level Workshop on Handholding Scheme hmang
content:
4842/2025-2026

Dated : Mamit the 16th of March, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Pi Carolyn L.B. Khiangte, Deputy Commissioner kaihhruainain District Level Workshop on Handholding Scheme hun hman a ni a. Mizoram State Policy Coordination Committee atangin Pu Neng Thianlala, Dy. CEO Implementation of Handholding Policy leh member dang te'n an telpui.

Pi Carolyn L. B Khiangte chuan Mizoram Sawrkar flagship programme-handholding scheme chu mimal emaw pawl emawin hmasawnna kawng an zawh theihna tur scheme a nih angin tangkai taka kan hman a duh thu sawiin, Line Department te chu Loan leh Special package dil tute endik mai niloin dil thei awm leh eizawnna kawnga khaichhuah ngaite zawnchhuahna kawngah taimak kan chhuah lehzual a tul thu a sawi.

He hunah hian Pu Lalnunfela Chawngthu, SDO (S)/Member Secretary, District Monitoring Committee chuan Mamit District chhunga Bana kaih (handholding) policy hnuaia hmalakna kalpui tawh dan leh thlen chinte a tarlang a ni.

Pu Neng Thianlala, Dy. CEO pawhin Bana Kaih Handholding Policy-in a tum leh mi harsa leh khaichhuah ngaite tana tangkai zawka hman a nih theihna tura zauzawka mipuite'n an hriat theih dan tur te zirtirna leh sawizauna neiin Line Department te hmalakna leh tihturte a tarlang bawk.

Kalkhawmte atangin zawhna leh chhanna hun hman a nih bakah Bana kaih (Handholding) Policy dil dan,phase 1 hnuaia loan hlawhtlinpuitute leh CM special Package hmang tangkaitute hlim thla thlir hona neih a ni bawk.

He hunah hian Pu Thuam Zamung Tunglut, LDM, Mamit leh Pu JD Traite, Development Manager bakah Mizoram State Policy Coordination Committee members te atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Mamit District chhungah hian Handholding Scheme hnuaiah Line Department 16 kaltlangin Phase 1 dawngtu mi 130 an awm tawh a, tunah hian Phase II hnuaiah mi 162 endik an ni tawh a, hetah hian mi 5 approved tawh niin, a dang hi a tahtawla endik chhoh tur an ni.

Attachment

title: CHAMPHAIAH GRIEVANCE REDRESSAL APPLICATION CHUNGCHANG SAWIHO
content:
4841/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 16th March 2026:Vawiin khan Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib hovin DC Conference Hall, Keifangtlangah Mizoram Transformation Programme hnuaia Grievance Redressal Program siam dan tur chungchang sawihona neih a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Grievance Redressal Application chungchang sawiho a ni a, hei hian mipuiten sorkar office a kal ngai kher lova online-a harsatna an neih te an thlen theihna tur leh rang taka chinfel a nih theihna tur atana ruahman a ni a, a kalpui dan, a hnathawh dan te sawiho a ni a. He application kaltlanga complaint dawnte chu a hun taka chinfel a nih theih nan a kaihhnawih department te'n rang taka hma an lak dan turte sawi ho a nih bakah member kalkhawmte hian application hi tangkai zawk hman a nih theihna tur atan rawtnate an neih te sawiho a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: EXCISE & NARCOTICS MINISTER PU LALNGHINGLOVA HMAR IN DEPARTMENT GOLDEN JUBILEE LAWMNA HAWNG
content:
4840/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 16th of March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:45 khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State, Excise & Narcotics Department chuan Excise & Narcotics Department Golden Jubilee hawnna chu Conference Hall, Commissionerate of Excise & Narcotics, Aizawl-ah a hmanpui a, Golden Jubilee Monument a hawng nghal. Golden Jubilee kumah rilru thar pu a, department chak leh tha zawk lantir turin thawktute a fuih.

Excise & Narcotics Department hi kum 1976, March 15 khan bul tan niin a tirah chuan Excise & Taxation Department tih a ni a, hun kal zelah Excise Department tiha kalpui a nih hnuah kum 1996 khan Excise & Narcotics Department tia kalpui a ni. Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan, "Kan department hi miin min phurpui hle a, kan beisei phak bakin mipuiin min thlawp a. Kan hotute pawhin min duhsak a, kan thawhhona a tha tih a lanna a ni. Excise & Narcotics Department a ka thawhpuite fak ka duh che a, theihtawp chhuahin kan bei chhunzawm zel bawk tur a ni." a ti a.

"Bible a kan hmuh chu kum 50-na hi jubilee kum a ni a, jubilee kumah chuan inngaihdamna te, zalenna kumahte an hmang thin. Chuvangin kan jubilee kumah hian keini pawh kan inngaihdam a, thawhhona tha lehzual zawk a awm theih nan kan insiamthatna hun tur a ni. Zalenna kum a nih angin mi tupawhin, bawih tanna eng ang pawh a lo nei a nih pawhin, he jubilee hi min chhuah zalentu nise, hneh a zalen tura kan rilru kan siamna ni rawh se." a ti bawk.

Minister chuan sawi belhin, "Mihring atanga thlir chuan kum 50 hi kan vanglai a ni a, tawnhriat kan nei tha tawh a, thil tam tak kan lo hre tawh. Kan tha chak lai leh kan fin vanglai tak a ni. Chuvang chuan kum 50 tling tawh department chu a fing tawh tur a ni." a ti a. "Kan hna bul ber chu ruihhlo do a ni a, chuvangin kan do lamah kan tan hi a thiang lo a ni. Jubilee kum a nih angin heti lamah i tang thar ang u." a ti a ni.

Excise & Narcotics Department Golden Jubilee lawmnaah hian Thawhtanni tlai dar 5:30 khan 'Golden Jubilee Mei Det programme' chu Commissioner of Excise hovin hman a ni a. March ni 18, Nilainiah Aizawl leh District dangahte Golden Jubilee pual a thisen pek runpui neih a ni ang. March ni 19, Ninganiah Excise & Narcotics Department a thawktu hluite nen 'A Day with Pensioner' hun hman a ni ang a, March 20, Zirtawpni chawhnu hian Golden Jubilee kharna hun hman a ni dawn a ni.

Vawiin Golden Jubilee hawnna hunah hian Pi Zothantluangi, Additional Secretary, Excise & Narcotics Department pawhin thu sawiin, "Ruihhlo hi Zoram in kan buaipui em em a, hei vang hian kan department hi department pawimawh tak a ni. Chhungkaw tinin kan buaipui a, hmalam kan pan zelna turah pawh kan ram tana chona lian a nih avangin chumi do tur department a kan han thawk thei hi lawm takin, thahnemngai takin thawk ang u" tiin a chah a ni.

Golden Jubilee Opening Ceremony hi Pu Z. Lalhmangaiha, Commissioner, Excise & Narcotics Department chuan a kaihruai a. He hunah hian Excise & Narcotics Department hnuaia officer hrang hrangte leh Commissionerate of Excise & Narcotics a thawktute zawng zawng an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Chief Minister Launches Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme 2.0
content:
543/2025-2026

Aizawl, 16 March 2026:The Chief Minister of Mizoram, Mr. Lalduhoma, today launched the Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme (MUHCS) 2.0 and the MUHCS Call Centre at the Assembly Annex Conference Hall during the lunch recess of the Assembly Session.

At the launching programme, Lalrinpuii, Health Minister attended as the Guest of Honour. The Speaker, Ministers, Adviser to the Chief Minister and several MLAs were also present.

In his address, the Chief Minister stated that the Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme has successfully completed its first year of implementation. He expressed gratitude to all officials and staff who worked diligently for the smooth functioning of the scheme, as well as to the hospitals empanelled under MUHCS.

He noted that the first year of the scheme was carefully reviewed and that substantial financial resources had been invested. However, seeing the benefits the scheme provides to the people, the government remains committed to continuing and strengthening it despite the significant expenditure.

For the financial year 2026–27, the government has allocated ₹130 crore for the scheme. In addition, government employees contribute approximately ₹26.42 crore, while the state has also secured a loan of over ₹800 crore from the Asian Development Bank. The Chief Minister said that MUHCS 2.0 will be implemented with further improvements over the previous version.

He urged the public to take advantage of the ongoing enrolment period, emphasizing that registration would not be allowed after the deadline. The enrolment period will remain open until 15 April 2026 and a one-month grace period will be allowed in June, though registration fees during the grace period will be 50% higher than the regular enrolment fee.

The Chief Minister also stated that the emergency or life-threatening care provision—allowing treatment at non-empanelled hospitals—has been reviewed and will be implemented more strictly under MUHCS 2.0. This provision will apply only to:

1. Patients requiring immediate ICU admission,2. Patients requiring urgent life-saving surgery, and3. Patients requiring immediate surgery due to accidents.

He further congratulated the Mizoram State Health Care Society for its achievements. The Society received ISO certification on 18 February 2026 from the International Organization for Standardization, recognizing its efficient office management and improved public service delivery.

In addition, Mizoram was recognized as one of the Best Performing States in beneficiary enrolment under Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana by the National Health Authority in January 2026, along with four other states. This award reflects that at least one member from each of the 2,16,584 eligible households in the state has obtained a Golden Card.

The Chief Minister also noted that payments to hospitals empanelled under MUHCS are being made smoothly without delays. While the guidelines stipulate that payments should be made monthly, the government has been able to disburse them weekly, demonstrating its strong commitment to universal health coverage and the state’s sound financial management.

MUHCS 2.0 will come into effect from 1 April 2026.

Speaking on the occasion, Health Minister Lalrinpuii said that patients referred outside the state are generally those suffering from conditions that cannot yet be treated within Mizoram. All such referrals must pass through the Medical Referral Board, which exercises strict scrutiny.

The launch programme was chaired by Pi K. Lalrinzuali, IAS, Commissioner & Secretary, Health & Family Welfare Department, who welcomed the attendees. Col. Lalbulliana, Territorial Commander, offered the invocation. The programme concluded with a vote of thanks by Dr. Lalhriatzuali Ralte, IAS, Chief Executive Officer of the Mizoram State Health Care Society.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN MIZORAM UNIVERSAL HEALTH CARE SCHEME 2.0 A HAWNG
content:
4839/2025-2026

Aizawl the 16th March 2026:Vawiin khan Assembly Annex Conference Hall-ah Assembly House Session chhun chawlh laiin Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan kum 2026-27 sorkar kum chhunga kalpui tur Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme 2.0 leh MUHCS Call Centre a hawng.

A hawnna inkhawmah hian Pi Lalrinpuii, Health Minister chu khualzahawm a ni a, Speaker, Minister, Adviser to CM leh MLA eng emawzatten an telpui.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme chuan kum hnihna alo chuangkai ta a. Tluang taka he scheme a kal theih nana tha leh zung sengtu zawng zawng te leh MUHCS zawmtu hospital-te chungah lawmthu ka sawi a ni.

MUHCS kum khatna kha uluk takin kan zir a, sum leh pai pawh kan seng nual a. Nimahsela mipuite tana a thatzia kan hmuhin sum leh pai senso hi tam tham deuh mahse insen zel kan huam. Tun budget tharah hian Rs. 130 Cr. kan dah a, sorkar hnathawk contribution hi Rs. 26.42 Cr vel a ni a, Asian Development Bank atangin Rs. 800 Cr chuang kan puk bawk a. MUHCS 2.0 hi a hma aia tha zawka kalpui kan tum a ni.

Mipuiten inziahluhna hun hawn mek hi bawh pelh lo ila, hun bituk pawn lamah inziahluh theih a nih loh avangin a hunbi hi ngaipawimawh ang u, a ti.

Inziah luh hun hi April ni 15, 2026 thleng hawn tur a ni a, May thla khar a ni ang a, June thlaah thla khat chhung “Grace period” hawn leh a ni ang. Grace period-a inziah luhna man erawh chu hun pangngaia inziah luh man aiin zaa sawmnga (50%) in a sang tawh ang.

Chief Minister hian, MUHCS kan kalpui mek danah emergency emaw nunna atana hlauhawm enkawlna pek kawngah empanelled damdawiin ni lova inenkawl theihna (provision) siam a ni a. He dan hi kan ennawn a MUHCS 2.0 ah hian khauh zawka kalpui kan tum.

Heng:

1) ICU a admit nghal ngai damlo2) Nunna chhan nana zai nghal ngai damlo3) Accident vanga zai nghal ngai damlo

te chauh hi MUHCS hnuaia emergency/life threatening provision-in a huam tawh dawn a ni, a ti.

Chief Minister hian Mizoram State Health Care Society te fakin lawmthu a hrilh bawk a. Mizoram State Health Care Society hian February ni 18, 2026 khan International Organization for Standardization (ISO) certification a hmu a, he certification hi Office inrelbawlna tha leh mipui tana service tangkai pek kawnga hmasawnna lawmawm tak a ni. Hei mai bakah hian Mizoram chuan National Health Authority hnen atangin January, 2026 khan AB PM-JAY hnuaia Beneficiary enrolment-ah Best State nihna chu state dang pali (4) rualin a lo dawng tawh bawk. He lawmman hian Mizoram chhunga Golden card nei thei chhungkaw 2,16,584 zinga chhung tin atangin member pakhat talin Golden Card an siam tawh tih a entir a ni.

Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme hnuaia inziak lut damdawiinte hnena bill pek chhuah hi khaih lak awm lovin tluang taka kalpui a ni a. A inkaihhruaina danin 'thlatin pek chhuah tur' a tih laiin sorkar chuan kartin a pe chhuak thei a. Hei hian sorkarin Universal Health Coverage a dah pawimawhzia leh sum leh pai dinhmun tha tak hnuaia kalpui a nihzia a tarlang a ni.

MUHCS 2.0 hi April ni 1, 2026 atanga kalpui tan a ni ang.

Pi Lalrinpuii, Health Minister pawhin thu sawiin, tun hnaia a bial chhunga nu nau chunga thi chanchin chuan a rilru a tihhrehawm thu leh thihna tuartute a lainat thu a sawi a. Damdawiin lamin tanpui ngai ngawih ngawih an lo hnar mai nia sawi chu a lungchhiatthlak a tih thu a tarlang. Health Minister a nih angin ngaihdam a dil a. Inquiry lak mek a nih thu a tarlang.

Universal Health Care Scheme kalpui a nih dawn khan kan huphurh ve em em a. Nimahsela, tluang takin kan kal ta a. Mipuite pawhin a thatzia an hre chho zel a. Kan lawm hle a ni. Kan kalpui tawh china phai lama kan refer te hi kan rama kan enkawl theih rih loh natnate an ni hlawm a. Refer tur reng reng hian Medical Refer Board an kaltlang zel a, Refer Board pawh kan fimkhur a tul hle. MUHCS 2.0 hi tha lehzuala kalpui kan tum a, mipuiten ngaihven tha ila, a hun takah inziaklut vek ila kan duh a ni, a ti.

MUHCS 2.0 hawnna inkhawm hi Pi K. Lalrinzuali, IAS, Commissioner & Secretary, H & FW chuan a kaihruai a, kal khawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Col. Lalbulliana, Territorial Commander chuan hunserh hmangin Dr. Lalhriatzuali Ralte, IAS, CEO, Mizoram State Health Care Society chuan lawmthu sawiin inkhawm a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram State Project Monitoring Committee in Khum 50 awmna tur Hnahthial District Hospital sak mek an endik
content:
4838/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 16th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram State Project Monitoring Committee (MSPMC) atangin Team Leader Er. Sanghrima Chawngthu kaihhruaina hnuaiah member pathum te chuan khum sawm nga (50 beded) awm theihna tur sak mek, District Hospital Hnahthial an endik a. He hunah hian PWD Building Division Senior EE, Er. Zodingliana; Medical Superitendent, Dr. Zosangliani leh Contractor te an tel a ni.

Hospital building leh Staff Quarters sak an enfiah hnu hian CMO Office Conference Hall-ah inkhawm hona hun hman a ni a. MSPMC Team Leader Er. Sanghrima Chawngthu chuan thu sawiin thil tha zawk a chhuah theihna atana Project te hi endik an nih thu a sawi a. Hnahthial District Hospital sak mek dinhmun pawh a hmunah an rawn hmuh tawh thu leh Hospital thawktuten siamrem tul an tih te, contractor te harsatna neih bakah chak zawka hna thawh a nih theih dan tur te chu Committee-ah report theh luh a nih tur thu a sawi a. Committee chuan mamawhte chu chak taka an bawhzui zel tur thu sawiin hetiang hunah hian an hmalakna hmachhawpte chu tualchhunga stake holder, NGOs leh khawtlang hruaitute hrilh hriat ve thin ni se tha a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Pu B. Lalkhawngaihzuala, Member MSPMC pawhin thu sawiin MSPMC in hma an lakna chhan chu thil tha zawk a chhuah theihna tur a nih thu a sawi a. Hnathawktu contractor-ten harsatna an tawh pawh an theihna kawngah an sutkianpui thin thu sawiin hna tha leh tlo, ram tana rotling siam chu an ngaih pawimawh ber a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Khum sawmnga (60 beded) awm theihna tur District Hospital Hnahthial leh Staff Quarters sak mek te hi North Eastern Consultancy Services (NECS) ten cheng vaibelchhe sawm paruk (16cores) chuang sengin an sa mek a ni.

Attachment

title: Excise & Narcotics Department kum 50 tlin (Golden Jubilee) champha Hnahthial Asst. Commissioner of Excise & Narcotics Office-ah lawm a ni
content:
4837/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 16th March, 2026:Mizoram Excise & Narcotics Department Kum 50 tlin lawmna champha - Golden Jubilee chu Assistant Commissioner of Excise & Narcotics, Hnahthial District Office chuan vawiin khan an pisa ah lawmna hun an hmang a. Pu Malsawmdawngzela, Asst. Commissioner of Excise, Hnahthial District chuan khuallian niin Jubilee hriat rengna lungphum chu a hawng.

Pu Malsawmdawngzela chuan Mizoram-a Excise & Narcotics Department din a nih chhoh dan sawiin Hnahthial Excise & Narcotics Office dinhmun tlangpui a tlarlang a. Kum 2024 December ni 13-ah Hnahthial Excise Station chu hawn a nih thu leh chutah chuan Officer in-Charge hovin thawktu paruk an awm thu a tarlang a. Hun reilo te hnuah sawrkar chuan Hnahthial District Excise Office chu ti changtlung zelin tunah chuan Asst. Commissioner hona hnuaiah thawktu sawm (10) an awm mek thu a tarlang a ni.

Hnahthial-a Excise Office hawn a nih atangin March ni 15 thleng khan Rakzu litre 4867, Heroin No. 4 gram 321, Ganja gram 70, zu bilh lai tin 25; Indian Made Foreign Liquor bottle 39 (750 ml each); Beer can 74; Pot pahnih (2) leh Cough Syrup phials 558 te an man tawh thu a tarlang a. Hemi kaihhnawih hian lirthei pakua (LMV – 5 leh TWO WHEELER – 4) leh Mobile Phone pakhat man a nih tawh thu a tarlang bawk.

MLP Act 2019 hnuaiah Case 247 ziaklut tawhin hemi kaihhnawiah tho hian mi 239 man an ni tawh a. ND&PS Act hnuaiah case pali (4) ziaklut in hemi kaihhnawihah hian mi panga (5) an man tawh bawk.

Ruihhlo do leh a manna kawngah hian mitinte thawhpuiah Asst. Commissioner chuan a sawm nghal a ni.

Attachment
